registry_rule: No custom intervention layer may be introduced without ontology update. Interventions must remain class-level recommendations unless sufficient evidence supports specific tactical advice.

layers.name: Proof Intervention
layers.purpose: Add evidence, authority, trust, or credibility signals

layers.name: UX Intervention
layers.purpose: Reduce path complexity or interface friction

layers.name: Pricing Intervention
layers.purpose: Improve pricing clarity, framing, or risk perception

layers.name: Timing Intervention
layers.purpose: Improve when prompts, offers, or follow-ups occur

layers.name: Sales-Assist Intervention
layers.purpose: Add human or automated assistance at high-friction points
layers.scanner_use: Human or automated help at high-friction points

contextual_mappings.label: Channel Intervention
contextual_mappings.rule: Channel Intervention is governed under Audience Intervention or Message Intervention, depending on context.

contextual_mappings.label: Measurement Governance
contextual_mappings.rule: Measurement Governance is governed under Attribution Intervention, and may relate to Lifecycle Intervention when retention visibility is affected.
